transcript.text:
[I was preparing content to provide help by visiting small business owners But unfortunately, as COVID-19 cases rise I will have to find an alternative way to support them without going face-to-face]
[Who is this lady on Tzuyang's channel?]
Hello, I am Tzuyang's fan from Changwon, South Korea
I used to work as a nurse and now an owner of a small fish-shaped bun business
My name is Ahn Sung Hye
Well as for my parents,
My father used work as a person who helped people move stuff with his truck
But he is laid off from work because of covid
He used to work every day, but now he had no choice but to stay home
Whenever I ask if he has work, he would reply "no"
[That's how she started this pastry business as he sold tangerines next to her]
My heart is heavy (frustrating)
I hope everything goes well
[South Gyeongsang Province, Changwon]
Hello~
What is this~

Give me 50 buns
Mom, she's here
It's my pleasure to meet you
You've come a long way
I didn't believe it at first when she contacted me
Even my mother didn't believe it and was like, "Why would she come to you?"
I actually didn't know why either
I couldn't sleep last night knowing that she's coming to see me
Tzuyang is here!
[Happy]
[TMI: Bungeo-ppang is a fish-shaped pastry usually stuffed with sweet red beans or cream] [A perfect snack on a cold day!]
[Give us Bungeo-ppang]
[Here you go]
[Exposed]
[Her true fan]
I initially had a good impression and a good feeling for Tzuyang

But it's because of recent events that made me really have a crush on her
I felt something in her
She told me she sent in a submission
I was saying there's no way she would come here
I saw her on YouTube and she was visiting big-name restaurants
So I said there's no way she'll come here
[Her submission through email]
[She is here to help and show support]
[Couple headbands prepared by Sung Hye]
I'm here to help their business for 1 day
I will do my best!
[Tzuyang's Bungeo-ppang] [Cream Puff or Red Bean! 3 for 3,000 Won! (~$2.75 USD)]
It's going to do well
They're going to sell so many Good luck!
[Grand opening! Tzuyang's bungeo-ppang]
[Not a very good start]

I'm doomed
[Preparing for business]
[Learning how to make it]
This is so much harder than I thought
Do you think we can sell any?
[She needs to sell them alone!] [Practice makes perfect]
[Perfect]
That's nice Very good job
Working hard in a cold weather No, it's okay
I have a YouTube channel as well
Really!?
I have 70 subscribers!
What do you do? This! (Channel name: _니모TV잉어아가씨)
It's cute, right? I used to be like that too
I will advertise your channel
[Please Subscribe~]

What is this?
I bought some stuff from the market to make you something
[Nutella Pastry] Will this work?
[Peanut Butter Pastry]
[Strawberry Jam Pastry]
[Trying the Nutella]
[Well..?]
It's delicious!
[Next-runner up]
This one is bleeding!
[Many things to say, but won't]
Why why why
I have a condition called Gastroesophageal Reflux Disease (GERD)
I can't even eat 1-serving a day even if I want to
I watch her eat because she's so good at eating
I take a bite, take a 5-minute break And repeat

She's my idol/wanna-be
She can somehow climb up a flight of stairs
But when she goes down the stairs, she needs a lot of help
She had a Herpes scar around her eye over here and it was interfering with her vision
And she had to go through surgery many times for that
I can't get a hold of my father in a phone call
I always yell "DAD!" And he says "Just text me"
He used to have great hearing
As he got older, he got an ear infection
He couldn't get it treated in time, so it got worse
What do you want to do with me today?
Nothing, really
She has no will
I would just love to get together as a family for a warm meal
[Don't worry about the store, go enjoy your time!]
I will write down how many I ate and how many I sold

So go have a great time with your family
Do you not trust me?
I don't know if I can really go
I'm worried
[You got this Tzuyang!]
[I believe in you]
[Please take care, we'll be back]
Bye bye!
I'll go now
She will do just fine Let's go
[Official Start]
What would you like? 1 cream puff, please
Just 1 sec
Oh no, it's burnt
[I was in a rush]
[Thank you]

I feel bad for accepting their money
Please take
Thank you
Just a moment, please
[Coal mining] What is this!?
I'll just take the burnt ones
No no, there's no way
You will get cancer if you eat the burnt crumbs!
I will have to give them more..
This one is ugly
It's okay, thank you
Thank you for waiting
I'm sorry but I put too much red beans and it's kind of leaking
You can take your time
Omy, I'm going to cry
[Meanwhile]

[It's been around 7 months since they went out to eat like this] It was like around May so it's been 7 months
Eat a lot!
[It's the small things that bring true happiness]
[Just spending "today" and being with your loved ones]
Daddy
What should we do after this?
Eat
After we eat
There's not much to do in Gapo So let's go to Gwisan
Let's go Gwisan?
Since it wasn't my business and always thought to myself that I'd help them some day
I was on my way to play with my friends
Then I pictured/thought about my parents making the pastry
Immediately took a U-turn to help them
Then I realized that they were not capable to handle it alone
It's easy to say that "if you're not capable, just don't do it"

But if they are off work again, I know that they will be depressed again
And it seemed like if I lent a helping hand, everyone will be happy
Of course, there were some debates
But I think I've made the right choice
[It's the best choice]
She sold this much already?
Over 100!
113!? Amazing
That one's okay too
Which one?
This one is better
Thank You Thank you and enjoy
Goodbye~
Hey sister,
I forgot to pay earlier
This is 1,000 Won, I forgot to pay

I was going to give it to you just now but I couldn't find the right timing
Thank you
Sorry, this one's really ugly
Thank you
It's the same when it goes in your belly
I'm always cheering you on
Thank you
Help me!
Please help me
My back hurts
[Getting too close]
Shoo!
[Meanwhile]
[Watching the villagers fish]
That's a nice one
My father needs a fishing partner/friend

How old is he?
He was born in 1955
55?
Then he's a young stud!
Really?
I'm 1948
Born 1948
[Exchange in numbers]
[Successful match]
Mister
Come eat our pastry later Okay!
Take care now
Let's do a handshake!
I'll call you Thank you
[The 3 family members making unforgettable memories]
[Capturing the moment in photos]

Great job
There's still so much to do
She must have gone through so much
Enjoy, thank you
[Need to refuel]
[Gulp Gulp Gulp]
[Hungry]
[The day is coming to an end]
[All the burnt pastries]
30 of them
I'll buy all of these
[Thoroughly clean]
You've sold so much more than usual
[So how much?]
There's 1 more!
75,000 Won!

9, 10
116,000 Won! (~$106.25 USD)
Great job
You too
I'm starving
Do you want to go eat?
It's on me
[End of business]
We are not healthy
and can't really do much for my kid
That hurts me the most
I'm just sad because of their current health status
They must be this sick because they were too busy taking care of their kids and not themselves
Really saddens me to see that
[Well deserved dinner after working hard]
This isn't much, but

It's for you and your parents
Since I know how cold it can get working outdoors
Wait no, it's not cold
[I hope this winter is a little warm]
I didn't know at first because I've never done business
But it's really really difficult being a small business owner
So I respect them so much
I hope everyone can get through this Covid hardship together
And to become happy business owners someday
Hwaiting! We can do it!
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
